UserComments.Comment: Do not exceed 3hrs. of continuous charging to avoid extra fees. To fully charge Your battery restart charging every 3hrs..Rich to amenities:restaurant,motel,restrooms,market...Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: Extra fee for exceeding 3hrs.of continuous charging. To fully charge your battery restart charging every 3hrs..

AddressInfo.Title: EVN Public Charging Station.
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Positioned on the motel's parking lot,but with unlimited public access, just in front of motel's office-well watched & safe place,U do not have to be motel's customer to use the charging station, very good salads in the nearby restaurant.
